name: Lead Magnet Banner
description: A high-conversion email capture block with a deep red gradient. Features a prominent headline, an image of the freebie (e.g., a PDF map), and an inline email signup form.

test_data.body: Every bún chả, bánh mì, and egg coffee spot we actually eat at. Numbered, mapped, ranked, and updated every month.
